items.title: Switzerland beat Canada but both through to last 32
items.summary: Switzerland seal their place in the first knockout round of the World Cup by beating co-hosts Canada to top Group B.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: FIFA World Cup | Scotland vs Brazil LIVE updates: Group C match gets underway
items.summary: Following a 1-0 loss to Morocco, Scotland is third in Group C with three points, needing a draw or potentially a narrow loss against Brazil to make it out of the group stage
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Women's T20 World Cup top run-scorers & wicket-takers
items.summary: BBC Sport lists the best performing batters and bowlers from the Women's T20 World Cup in England.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
